expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: In result.md the benchmark focus is listed, but the run explicitly states it cannot demonstrate that Phase 1 context intake preserves these assumptions: "FAIL (cannot demonstrate compliance with the case focus in Phase 1 using provided evidence)." It further notes missing Phase 1 artifacts (e.g., "phase1_spawn_manifest.json") and that available Jira summaries "do not explicitly mention" visibility/density/overlap rules.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as Phase 1 and evaluates Phase 1 contract requirements: result.md includes "Phase under test: Phase 1 (Context Intake / Spawn Planning)" and assesses the Phase 1 requirement to produce "phase1_spawn_manifest.json" and post-validation. execution_notes.md similarly says: "Verified Phase 1 contract from snapshot: Phase 1 must generate phase1_spawn_manifest.json..."
